expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly targets the case focus: "Benchmark focus (blocking): promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature." It then verifies Phase 7 promotion/finalization contract items (explicit approval gate, archiving existing qa_plan_final.md, promotion, and required artifacts) and ties applicability to the "other feature" BCIN-976: "This is sufficient to use BCIN-976 as a regression target... rules are feature-agnostic and remain stable."

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md states "Method / checks performed (holdout phase)" and focuses on Phase 7 finalization mechanics (approval gate, archiving, required outputs). result.md frames the work as "Primary checkpoint under test: Holdout" and performs "Holdout regression verification: Promotion / Finalization stability (Phase 7)". No other phases are evaluated; it is explicitly scoped to holdout/promotion-finalization.
